title: LRU Cache

- get(key) — return value if exists, else -1
- put(key, value) — insert or update. Evict LRU key if over capacity.

Both operations must run in O(1) time.

examples.input: cache=LRUCache(2); put(1,1); put(2,2); get(1)=1; put(3,3); get(2)=-1
